
### checking a VTable return  {.smaller}


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

```{.gnuassembler .borderedcodebox}
...
  // %rdi = A or B object
  movq (%rdi), %rax
  movq (%rax), %rax
  cmpq $0xe0c5df0b, 2(%rax)
  jne CRASH
  call *%rax
  label $0x64a0cfe3
  ret
```
 
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

```{.gnuassembler .borderedcodebox}
A::bar():
  label $0xe0c5df0b
  ...
  pop %rdx // RDX <- return address
  cmp $0x64a0cfe3, 2(%rdx)
  jne CRASH
  jmp *%rdx
B::bar():
  label $0xe0c5df0b
  ...
  pop %rdx // RDX <- return address
  cmp $0x64a0cfe3, 2(%rdx)
  jne CRASH
  jmp *%rdx
```
 
:::

::::


* if we want to use this label-checking on the return <br> need to choose the same label for A::bar and B::bar return, too
